top_signals.title: China Chip Stock Pullback Drives Investor Fear to Record High
top_signals.summary: A measure of investor sentiment on China technology hardware is flashing its most bearish reading ever as the red-hot rally in chip stocks rapidly cools.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Coronation Trims TSMC, SK Hynix on AI Hype, Boosts India Stocks
top_signals.summary: Coronation Asset Management Ltd., which oversees $47 billion, has trimmed its exposure to chipmakers and increased its allocation to India, as expectations for artificial intelligence stocks have risen to levels that are nearly impossible to beat.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations
top_signals.summary: Agencies issue joint statement on handling of highly sensitive information during bank examinations

top_signals.title: Stocks Tumble as Chipmakers Suffer Steep Losses: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Stocks tumbled, sending tech-heavy gauges to their worst day since the unveiling of US tariffs in April last year as investors rotated out of technology shares, deepening a selloff in chipmakers after their blistering rally this year.
